name: openclaw-claude-bridge
description: OpenAI-compatible proxy bridging OpenClaw to Claude Code CLI

scripts.test: node scripts/test-tool-parser.js && node scripts/test-routing.js && node scripts/test-security.js && node scripts/test-attachment-allowlist.js && node scripts/test-attachment-async-download.js
scripts.postinstall: cd dashboard && npm install --ignore-scripts && npm run build
